STT Pipeline Conditions for 2/2/2026


Notice Text:

For Gas Day February 2, 2026, Sabal Trail Transmission, LLC (STT) has approved and scheduled nominations at each pipeline segment and meter station up to STT's operational capacity. The following locations have been restricted due to requested nominations exceeding STT's operational capacity:

STT has scheduled and sealed nominations sourced upstream of the Dunnellon Compressor Station for delivery downstream of the Dunnellon Compressor Station. No increases in receipts sourced upstream of Dunnellon for delivery downstream of Dunnellon will be accepted.

Customers are advised that capacity may become available as the nomination and confirmation process continues throughout the day.

Please contact your Operations Account Representative if you have any questions.




BackPrint
